org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class ErsapRequests.ServiceConfigRequestBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ErsapRequests.ServiceConfigRequestBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    ErsapRequests

    public static class ErsapRequests.ServiceConfigRequestBuilder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builds a request to configure a service. A service can be configured with data, or by setting the event count to publish data/done reports.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ErsapRequests.ServiceReportRequest startDataReporting(int eventCount)
      Creates a request to start reporting the output data on executions of the specified service.
      ErsapRequests.ServiceReportRequest startDoneReporting(int eventCount)
      Creates a request to start reporting "done" on executions of the specified service.
      ErsapRequests.ServiceReportRequest stopDataReporting()
      Creates a request to stop reporting the output data on executions of the specified service.
      ErsapRequests.ServiceReportRequest stopDoneReporting()
      Creates a request to stop reporting "done" on executions of the specified service.
      ErsapRequests.ServiceConfigRequest withData(EngineData data)
      Creates a request to configure the specified service with the given data.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • withData

        public ErsapRequests.ServiceConfigRequest withData(EngineData data)
        Creates a request to configure the specified service with the given data. If the service does not exist, the message is lost.
        Parameters:
        data - the data for configuring the service
        Returns:
        a service configuration request to be run

      • startDoneReporting

        public ErsapRequests.ServiceReportRequest startDoneReporting(int eventCount)
        Creates a request to start reporting "done" on executions of the specified service. Configures the service to repeatedly publish "done" messages after a number of eventCount executions have been completed. If the service does not exist, the message is lost.
        Parameters:
        eventCount - the interval of executions to be completed to publish the report
        Returns:
        a service configuration request to be run

      • stopDoneReporting

        public ErsapRequests.ServiceReportRequest stopDoneReporting()
        Creates a request to stop reporting "done" on executions of the specified service. Configures the service to stop publishing "done" messages. If the service does not exist, the message is lost.
        Returns:
        a service configuration request to be run

      • startDataReporting

        public ErsapRequests.ServiceReportRequest startDataReporting(int eventCount)
        Creates a request to start reporting the output data on executions of the specified service. Configures the service to repeatedly publish the resulting output data after a number of eventCount executions have been completed. If the service does not exist, the message is lost.
        Parameters:
        eventCount - the interval of executions to be completed to publish the report
        Returns:
        a service configuration request to be run

      • stopDataReporting

        public ErsapRequests.ServiceReportRequest stopDataReporting()
        Creates a request to stop reporting the output data on executions of the specified service. Configures the service to stop publishing the resulting output data. If the service does not exist, the message is lost.
        Returns:
        a service configuration request to be run
